meanings.definition: the opening of a subject to widespread discussion and debate
a short excursion (a walk or ride) in the open air
examples: he took the dogs for an airing

meanings.definition: the act of supplying fresh air and getting rid of foul air

examples: This show will air Saturdays at 2 P.M.

meanings.definition: broadcast over the airwaves, as in radio or television
examples: We cannot air this X-rated song
She aired her opinions on welfare

meanings.definition: expose to warm or heated air, so as to dry
expose to cool or cold air so as to cool or freshen
